creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Update multimedia/emby-server to the latest stable upstream release 3.0.5675.1.

Changes this release (bug fixes only):
 * Local metadata settings sometimes not respected
 * Certain combinations of settings leading to people getting lost
 * Improved Firefox responsiveness with remote control and scheduled tasks
 * Xbox one layout distorted
 * Playback notifications not including series name
 * Default user icon in header too small
 * Non-admins able to group versions
 * Playback of cloud synced content
 * Video playlist not advancing to next track
 * Image editor upload button not responsive
 * List page selection check boxes not accessible
 * Fix people sorting
 * Fixed Ac/DC getting split into multiple artists
 * Fix metadata manager jumping around when clicking on tabs
 * Metadata manager sidebar doesn't auto-scroll down to selected item
 * Spinning wheel not disappearing when it should
 * Side menu taking nearly all of windows phone screen width
 * Movies per actor not displaying uniformly
